name: frontend-visual-qa
description: >- Audits already-rendered web, landing-page, HTML deck/slide, browser tool/game, dashboard/admin, design-system, and desktop UIs using real-browser or native-app journeys, inspected screenshots, DOM geometry, responsive or projection viewports, and a bundled Playwright sweep. Use after UI implementation to find typography, wrapping, overlap, overflow, responsive, route, overlay, map, transient-state, data-visualization, browser-output, file-dialog, PDF/print, or Electron-shell defects, or to co
author: daymade
